audience_doors.name: Colleges & Universities
audience_doors.positioning: Govern AI adoption without instructional chaos. Lead with faculty-safe implementation, learner support, LMS fit, and evidence that AI improves practice.

audience_doors.name: Learning Platforms & EdTech
audience_doors.positioning: Turn content into governed practice. Lead with hands-on execution, model access, and assessment without forcing the platform to own infrastructure risk.

audience_doors.name: Certification & Credentialing
audience_doors.positioning: Move from content delivery to performance proof. Lead with live-task credibility, cost predictability, and real-environment readiness.

audience_doors.name: Technology Companies & Platforms
audience_doors.positioning: Turn product interest into governed usage. Lead with enablement, sandboxed usage, policy control, and budget control.

audience_doors.name: Global Services & Consulting
audience_doors.positioning: Deliver repeatable client training and internal upskilling with standardized governed environments and scalable cohort delivery.

audience_doors.name: Online Universities & Scale Providers
audience_doors.positioning: Deliver competency-based outcomes at massive asynchronous scale with always-available execution and granular financial governance.

products.name: AI Notebook
products.summary: Cloud-based Jupyter-powered learning and lab environment with AI and compute support.

products.name: Cloud Labs
products.summary: Governed hands-on cloud access for real platform experience without unmanaged learner risk.

products.name: AI Gateway
products.summary: Governed model access and policy layer for institutional or platform AI usage.

products.name: Developer Workspaces
products.summary: Browser-based workspaces across VS Code, JupyterLab, RStudio, Linux Desktop, and related environments.

products.name: AI Compass
products.summary: Course-grounded AI tutoring and learner support tied directly to learner workflow.

products.name: Agentic AI Labs
products.summary: Browser-based IDE plus AI agent plus real cloud target inside a governed sandbox.

products.name: Platform Enablement Labs
products.summary: Makes partner and customer platforms education-ready for training, enablement, and adoption.

proof_anchors.name: UC San Diego / GPS
proof_anchors.anchor: AI Compass math proof with 80k+ graded responses with feedback, 16.9k tutor questions, and failure-rate movement from 35.6% to 11.4% vs prior cohort.

proof_anchors.name: University of Michigan
proof_anchors.anchor: Campus AI governance at scale with secure U-M GPT and Azure OpenAI support for 50,000+ students.

proof_anchors.name: AWS Academy
proof_anchors.anchor: 2M+ learners supported globally with restricted sandboxes, budget guardrails, and real AWS access.

proof_anchors.name: Databricks Academy
proof_anchors.anchor: 130,000+ badges and certifications plus 100,000 to 125,000 labs started per day across 600+ University Alliance members.

proof_anchors.name: NAIRR Classroom
proof_anchors.anchor: Core role alongside Microsoft and NVIDIA when the conversation is governed AI access and national-scale infrastructure.

style_rules: Lead with the strongest proof point or number before explanatory text.
Use short declarative sentences and cut unsupported adjectives.
Prefer table-driven comparisons and structured methodology when useful.
Keep one coral accent anchor per section.
Use named proof with attribution when a direct public source exists.
Do not turn source-specific metrics into platform-wide averages.
